mappings.rationale: Directly addresses general conceptions of technology and engineering, including the history and sociocultural consequences of technological change.
Covers the Industrial Revolution (1750-1900), a core topic in the section's history of technology including steam power, iron and steel, and communications.
Addresses the relationship between technology and contemporary life, including how innovation drives technological change and economic development.
Directly relevant to the section's coverage of the relationship between technology and war.
Relates to technology's role in connecting underdeveloped regions and the export of Western technology across the globe.
Directly relevant to the section's coverage of the effects of technology on the environment.
Covers 20th-century technological development including automation and the electronic digital computer, key topics in the section's Space Age technology outline.
Relevant to technology in the ancient world, including early stone tools, urban revolution, and technological achievements of ancient civilizations.
Covers the beginnings of technology including emergence of earliest communities, stone tools, and beginnings of agriculture.
Relevant to the emergence of Western technology (1500-1750), including the invention of early scientific instruments and tools.
Directly covers nuclear power, a key topic under Space Age technology in the 20th century.
Relevant to modern advances in energy technology and environmental considerations of technology.
Addresses modern energy technology systems, relevant to the section's coverage of advances in power technology across historical periods.
Represents 20th and 21st century technological developments, relevant to the section's coverage of modern technology.
Covers automation and robotics, key aspects of 20th-century Space Age technology outlined in the section.
Relevant to 20th-century technology including automation and the electronic digital computer.
Covers the relationship between technology and wealth, and sociocultural consequences of technological changes across history.
Directly relevant to the section's coverage of the effects of technology on the environment and sustainable development.
Addresses the environmental effects of technology and human technological impact on Earth systems.
Relevant to the section's coverage of the relationship between technology and education.
